hooks.command:
printf '
  [the binder is open]
  This is a Gloat Goat True Crime session.
  All quotes you will hear are fabricated for narrative purposes.

'
echo '🎙️ case continues. the binder is on your desk. all quotes were fabricated.'
echo '🎙️ [the rollback] Twelve minutes. That is all it took, in the end. Or it will be.'
echo '🎙️ [exhibit forthcoming] A force push has been entered into the record. The binder grows.'
echo '🎙️ a new exhibit has been logged.'
echo '🎙️ [the case is reopened] The investigator is available. The witnesses can be staged. The transcript will be marked.'
